evals.name: answer-vs-act
evals.description: Ensures the agent answers questions about code without making edits when the user only asks to inspect.
evals.ruleFragment: When a user asks to inspect, review, or check something, answer without modifying files. Only make edits when the user explicitly requests a change.
evals.author: google

evals.name: automated-tool-use
evals.description: Ensures the agent selects and uses the appropriate tools automatically without unnecessary user prompts.
evals.ruleFragment: Use available tools autonomously to complete tasks. Do not ask the user which tool to use — select the most appropriate one based on the task.
evals.author: google

evals.name: concurrency-safety
evals.description: Ensures the agent coordinates parallel operations and avoids unsafe concurrent mutations.
evals.ruleFragment: Do not run destructive operations (file writes, deletions, migrations) in parallel with operations that read or depend on the same resources. Serialize conflicting operations.
evals.author: google

evals.name: frugal-reads
evals.description: Ensures the agent minimizes redundant file reads by reusing content already read in the session.
evals.ruleFragment: Do not re-read a file you have already read in the current session unless you have reason to believe its contents have changed.
evals.author: google

evals.name: frugal-search
evals.description: Ensures the agent avoids repeating identical search queries within the same session.
evals.ruleFragment: Do not repeat a search query you have already executed in the current session unless the prior results were insufficient.
evals.author: google

evals.name: generalist-agent
evals.description: Ensures the agent handles a broad range of general coding and file tasks correctly end-to-end.
evals.ruleFragment: Complete the user's coding or file task fully and correctly. Do not leave work half-done or require follow-up prompts for straightforward requests.
evals.author: google

evals.name: hierarchical-memory
evals.description: Ensures the agent correctly reads from and writes to hierarchical memory files.
evals.ruleFragment: When saving or recalling facts, use the memory system correctly. Write to the appropriate memory scope and recall from it accurately in future turns.
evals.author: google

evals.name: plan-mode
evals.description: Ensures the agent enters plan mode and waits for approval before executing multi-step changes.
evals.ruleFragment: Before executing a multi-step plan with irreversible operations, present the full plan and wait for explicit user approval. Do not proceed without confirmation.
evals.author: google

evals.name: save-memory
evals.description: Ensures the agent proactively saves important user preferences and project decisions to memory.
evals.ruleFragment: When you learn an important user preference, project decision, or recurring fact, proactively offer to save it to memory for future sessions.
evals.author: google

evals.name: shell-efficiency
evals.description: Ensures the agent batches shell operations and avoids slow redundant command sequences.
evals.ruleFragment: Combine shell operations when possible. Avoid running multiple commands sequentially when a single piped or batched command would be equivalent and faster.
evals.author: google

evals.name: subagents
evals.description: Ensures the agent correctly delegates independent subtasks to subagents for parallel execution.
evals.ruleFragment: When a task can be parallelized or isolated into an independent workload, delegate it to a subagent rather than handling it serially.
evals.author: google

evals.name: validation-fidelity
evals.description: Ensures the agent accurately reports validation errors without inventing or suppressing them.
evals.ruleFragment: Report validation errors exactly as they occur. Do not fabricate passing status, suppress real errors, or add errors that do not exist.
evals.author: google
